name: ExtensionDevice_UdiCarrier_EntryType
title: R5: barcode | rfid | manual | card | self-reported | electronic-transmission | unknown additional codes
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Device.udiCarrier.entryType` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Device.udiCarrier.entryType` 0..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Device.udiCarrier.entryType` 0..1 `code`
*  R4B: `Device.udiCarrier.entryType` 0..1 `code`
*  R4: `Device.udiCarrier.entryType` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Device.udiCarrier.entryType` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `Device.udiCarrier.entryType` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `Device.udiCarrier.entryType` do not allow expression of the necessary codes, per the bindings on the source and target.

element.short: R5: barcode | rfid | manual | card | self-reported | electronic-transmission | unknown additional codes

binding.description: Codes to identify how UDI data was entered.
